Name: OpeningMain
Title: Ashes of Arrival
Summary: Escape the catastrophe, survive the first miracle, and choose where to seek answers next.

Name: OpeningSide
Title: Witness of Fire
Summary: Decide whether to conceal the miracle from the first mortal witness or let the story spread.

Name: EgyptMain
Title: The Radiant Voice
Summary: Investigate the temple archive and decide whether the oracle should remain hidden, shared, or exposed.

Name: EgyptSide
Title: Bread for the Floodplain
Summary: Resolve a famine through agronomy, public miracle, priestly alliance, or refusal.

Name: GreeceMain
Title: The High One of Storm
Summary: Unmask or join the sanctuary ruler who turned spectacle and prophecy into kingship.

Name: GreeceSide
Title: Spear and Omen
Summary: Stop a warband by negotiation, sabotage, staged omen, or force.

Name: ItalicMain
Title: The Keeper of Measures
Summary: Confront the bronze lawgiver and shape whether order becomes service, rule, or domination.

Name: ItalicSide
Title: Boundary Fire
Summary: Resolve a land dispute through law, ritual, intimidation, engineering, or selective violence.

Name: ConvergenceMain
Title: Many Names
Summary: Decide the fate of the descent apparatus, your companions, and the identity history will remember.
